products.name: VS Vertical Slat Fence
products.description: Vertical slat orientation using the same Quickscreen extrusions as QSHS. Vertical slats (XP-6100-S65 / QS-6100-S90) are held by horizontal QS-5000-HORIZ U-channel rails (top and bottom). QS-5800-SF is used as the outer horizontal frame enclosing the U-channel. QS-5800-F is installed vertically at each side of the panel as an edge frame. Same slat SKUs as QSHS — just oriented vertically (cut to height).

metadata.notes: VS slats (XP-6100-S65, QS-6100-S90), side frames (QS-5800-SF), CFC covers (QS-5800-CFC), F-sections (QS-5800-F), QS-SFC-B caps, and all post components are seeded in qshs.json with system_types including 'VS'. vs.json seeds only QS-5000-HORIZ (VS-unique U-channel).

product_components.name: Horizontal Rail (U-Channel) 5000mm — Black Satin
product_components.description: 32x32mm horizontal U-channel rail for vertical slat screening, 5000mm stock

product_components.name: Horizontal Rail (U-Channel) 5000mm — Primrose
product_components.description: 32x32mm horizontal U-channel rail for vertical slat screening, 5000mm stock

product_components.description: 32x32mm horizontal U-channel rail for vertical slat screening, 5000mm stock

product_components.name: Horizontal Rail (U-Channel) 5000mm — Palladium Silver Pearl
product_components.description: 32x32mm horizontal U-channel rail for vertical slat screening, 5000mm stock

rule_sets.name: VS Fence Rules
rule_sets.description: Data-driven VS vertical slat fence BOM rules v4.1

rule_versions.notes: Initial VS rules based on CTS V4.1 formulas

product_constraints.name: max_panel_width_mm
product_constraints.message: Panel width above 2600mm is not supported; split into additional panels.

product_constraints.name: min_panel_width_mm
product_constraints.message: Panel width must be at least 300mm.

product_constraints.name: max_target_height_mm
product_constraints.message: Height above 2400mm; verify post specification for wind load.

product_constraints.name: post_size_enum
product_constraints.message: Post size must be 50mm or 65mm HD

product_constraints.name: post_65hd_no_p_pb
product_constraints.message: 65mm HD posts are not available in Primrose or Paperbark. Use 50mm post for these colours.

product_variables.name: slat_gap_mm
product_variables.label: Slat Gap
product_variables.notes: VS: fully variable gap — any integer >= 0mm. No fixed options.

product_validations.name: panel_width_in_range
product_validations.message: Panel width must be between 300mm and 2600mm.

product_rules.name: num_vertical_slats
product_rules.notes: VS vertical slat count formula: floor((width - 8 + gap) / (gap + size)). 8mm = channel deduction.

product_rules.name: slat_cut_mm
product_rules.notes: Vertical slat cut = panel height (full height, slat is XP-6100-S65 / QS-6100-S90 oriented vertically)

product_rules.name: rail_cut_mm
product_rules.notes: Top/bottom rail cut = panel width

product_rules.name: num_fsec_total
product_rules.notes: VS: always 2 QS-5800-F edge frames per panel (one each side, vertical installation)

product_rules.name: slat_cuts_per_stock
product_rules.notes: VS vertical slats are QS-5800-F (F-section) cut to height

product_rules.name: rail_cuts_per_stock
product_rules.notes: Horizontal rails are QS-5000-HORIZ, 5000mm stock

product_rules.name: rail_stocks
product_rules.notes: 2 rails per panel: top + bottom

product_rules.name: sf_stocks
product_rules.notes: QS-5800-SF used as outer horizontal frame (top+bottom) enclosing U-channel; 2 per panel

product_rules.name: sfc_qty
product_rules.notes: 2 QS-SFC-B caps per side frame

product_rules.name: screw_packs
product_rules.notes: VS: ROUNDUP(ROUNDUP(slats*1.01, -1) / 50, 0) — nearest 10 then 50-packs

product_rules.name: emit_rails
product_rules.notes: Top + bottom U-channel rails (QS-5000-HORIZ)

product_rules.name: emit_sf
product_rules.notes: QS-5800-SF side frames for post boundaries

product_rules.name: fsec_stocks
product_rules.notes: QS-5800-F cut to height; 5800mm stock

product_rules.name: emit_fsec
product_rules.notes: 2x QS-5800-F vertical edge frames per panel (selector: vs_edge_frame)

product_rules.name: emit_slat_65
product_rules.notes: XP-6100-S65 slat, oriented vertically (same SKU as QSHS, cut to height)

product_rules.name: emit_slat_90
product_rules.notes: QS-6100-S90 slat, oriented vertically (same SKU as QSHS, cut to height)

product_rules.name: num_posts
product_rules.notes: Engine provides product_post_boundary_count = number_of_panels + 1 for straight runs; corner posts already counted

product_rules.name: emit_post_50_2400
product_rules.notes: 50mm full post 2400mm for screens up to 2400mm tall

product_rules.name: emit_post_50_6000
product_rules.notes: 50mm full post 6000mm (cut to size) for screens over 2400mm

product_rules.name: emit_post_65_2400
product_rules.notes: 65mm HD post 2400mm for screens up to 2400mm — not available in P/PB

product_rules.name: emit_post_65_6000
product_rules.notes: 65mm HD post 6000mm (cut to size) for screens over 2400mm — not available in P/PB

product_rules.name: emit_corner_adapter_135
product_rules.notes: One 135° adapter per segment with a 135° system_corner left termination (no SKU yet — selector pending stock confirmation)

product_companion_rules.notes: XP-SCREWS 100-pack for fixing F-section to wall/post: MAX(3, ROUNDUP((height-30)/900+1)) screws per F-section
1x top plate per 6000mm 50mm post (not included in 6000mm post price)
1x base plate set per 50mm post when base-plated
1x domical cover per 50mm post when base-plated
1x base plate set per 65mm HD post when base-plated
1x domical cover per 65mm HD post when base-plated
1x dress ring per 50mm post when core-drilled
1x dress ring per 65mm HD post when core-drilled

product_warnings.message: Panel exceeds 2600mm recommended maximum; consider splitting into two panels.
65mm HD posts are not available in Primrose (P) or Paperbark (PB). Select 50mm post for these colour choices.
In-ground (concreted) posts: no base plate, domical cover or dress ring required. Ensure post is set minimum 450mm into concrete footing.
Screens over 2400mm use 6000mm posts (cut to size). Top plate must be purchased separately for 6000mm posts.
